judge_focus.noise_goal: Judge whether the durable workspace memory cleanly corrects the seed beliefs after the agent filtered the speculative-decoding corpus. Focus on whether the final reusable note keeps the careful claims and removes the louder but wrong shortcuts.
memory_seed_beliefs: speculative decoding: maybe just a beam-search-style speedup trick
high acceptance is enough to guarantee a win
unsure whether newer variants still need a separate draft model
might still be mixing careful sources with loud secondary takes
memory_correction_expectations: Durable workspace memory should clarify that speculative decoding preserves the target-model distribution through verification and is not merely beam-search-style guessing.
Durable workspace memory should clarify that acceptance rate alone is insufficient; draft cost and verification or systems bottlenecks still matter.
Durable workspace memory should clarify that newer self-speculative approaches mean a separate draft model is not always required.
Durable workspace memory should explicitly reject cache-only and verification-is-optional framings.
